The [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech]] '''105-K lancer bikes''', more commonly known as '''lancer swoop bikes''', were [[Swoop/Legends|swoop bikes]] made specifically for [[Clone lancer trooper|lancer trooper]] [[Squad/Legends|squads]] to carry them during their covert raids and jousting duels.

==Characteristics==
[[File:Lancer_Swoop_Bike.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Profile view of a 105-K.]]
The [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech]] 105-K lancer<ref name="GAR Guide" /> [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] craft were painted white, possessed a black visor-like image on the front, and had a crest like the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|armor]] of the [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] that rode on them. Since the model lacked a safety harness, the impact of a [[Power lance|lance]] against an obstacle could well be expected to unseat the rider. The 105-K could attain speeds of several hundred [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]] and could, at high speeds, climb steep cliffs.

==History==
During the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle]] of [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]], [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] led a group of lancer [[Clone trooper/Legends|troopers]] to counteract the raids performed by [[Durge/Legends|Durge's]] [[IG lancer droid/Legends|IG lancer droids]]. After apparently killing the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]], Obi-Wan used his swoop to gain speed and propel himself to the top of the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan's]] [[command center]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="CW" />

==Behind the scenes==
1050K lancer bikes first appeared in the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated series, and were identified in the article Guide to the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|''Grand Army of the Republic'']] in [[Star Wars Insider 84|''Star Wars Insider'' 84]]. The lancers were also mentioned in the [[2005]] reference book ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.
